'''Akuria II''' was an ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Akuria system/Legends|Akuria system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Polar Base|base]]. The Imperials there were defeated by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] force led by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Odan]]. The Alliance originally considered basing themselves there, but chose [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] instead.

The planet was also the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the native [[Akurian|Snow Demons]], also known as Akurians, which the Empire hunted without realizing that they were particularly [[Sentience/Legends|intelligent]]. After [[Mission to Akuria II|liberating]] the planet from the Empire, the Alliance allowed these creatures to reclaim their frigid world.

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the clean-up effort of the final remnants of the Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] there was also led by Colonel Odan. A young man named [[Maren Kelsome]] was given his first assignment with the Rebellion as a scout assigned to assist with the clean-up of Akuria II. He performed adequately, sweeping retreating Imperial [[Imperial Army trooper/Legends|troopers]] from the gutted garrison. For his efforts, Odan promoted Kelsome from [[Private/Legends|private]] to [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]].

Kelsome's experience in arctic survival on Akuria II would inspire him to answer the call for service on the planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Similarly, a member of Akuria II's Imperial garrison was later transferred to [[Blizzard Force/Legends|Blizzard Force]], and served during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. He was mauled to death by one of the Rebels' caged [[Wampa/Legends|wampas]] inside [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].<ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>
